title: What To Know as China’s Xi Jinping Heads to North Korea
summary_full: As Xi Jinping visits Pyongyang, he faces an emboldened North Korean dictator, whose alliance with Russia has reduced his dependence on China.
summary_public: As Xi Jinping visits Pyongyang, he faces an emboldened North Korean dictator, whose alliance with Russia has reduced his dependence on China.

RU.label: neutral
RU.evidence: alliance with Russia has reduced his dependence on China
